changeSet.author: klychagin
changeSet.createView: select rr.rep_tp_id, rep_tp.af_id || ' ' || rep_tp.name as label, count(*) cnt from dm.reg_reports rr join dm.rep_tp on rr.rep_tp_id=rep_tp.rep_tp_id where status='OK' and rep_tp.type='REG' group by rr.rep_tp_id, rep_tp.af_id, rep_tp.name

column.name: periods_label
column.defaultValue: день, неделя, месяц, квартал, полугодие, год

changeSet.author: klychagin
changeSet.createView: select rep_tp_id, msr_prd_id, msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_caption, max(finish_dttm) finish_dttm, jsonb_agg(json_build_object('rep_id',rep_id,'status',status,'format',format)) from dm.reg_reports where status in ('OK','FAILED','RUNNING') group by rep_tp_id, msr_prd_id, msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_caption, msr_prd_st_dttm order by rep_tp_id,msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_st_dttm

changeSet.author: klychagin
changeSet.createView: select rr.rep_tp_id, rep_tp.af_id || ' ' || rep_tp.name as label, status, count(*) cnt from dm.reg_reports rr join dm.rep_tp on rr.rep_tp_id=rep_tp.rep_tp_id where rep_tp.type='REG' and status!='NEW' group by rr.rep_tp_id, rep_tp.af_id, status, rep_tp.name

changeSet.author: klychagin
changeSet.createView: select rep_tp_id, msr_prd_id, msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_caption, max(finish_dttm) finish_dttm, jsonb_agg(json_build_object('rep_id',rep_id,'status',status,'format',format,'reason',reason)) from dm.reg_reports where status !='NEW' group by rep_tp_id, msr_prd_id, msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_caption, msr_prd_st_dttm order by rep_tp_id,msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_st_dttm
